posts.raw_content:
On iPhone / iPad (Apple Intelligence)

Open the Settings app.

Scroll down and tap Apple Intelligence & Siri.

Toggle off the Apple Intelligence switch.

Tap Turn Off Apple Intelligence to confirm.


On Mac (Apple Intelligence)

Click the Apple Menu in the top left and open System Settings.

Select Apple Intelligence & Siri in the left sidebar.

Toggle off Apple Intelligence at the top.


On AndroidOpen your phone's Settings app.

Go to Google.

Tap All Services, then select Settings for Google apps.

Go to Search, Assistant & Voice.

Tap Google Assistant, select General, and toggle it of
posts.author: OrangeManNotBad
posts.title: Turning off AI features depends on your specific device or platform.  Here are step-by-step instructions for the most common systems:
posts.content:
On iPhone / iPad (Apple Intelligence)

Open the Settings app.

Scroll down and tap Apple Intelligence & Siri.

Toggle off the Apple Intelligence switch.

Tap Turn Off Apple Intelligence to confirm.

On Mac (Apple Intelligence)

Click the Apple Menu in the top left and open System Settings.

Select Apple Intelligence & Siri in the left sidebar.

Toggle off Apple Intelligence at the top.

On AndroidOpen your phone's Settings app.

Go to Google.

Tap All Services, then select Settings for Google apps.

Go to Search, Assistant & Voice.

Tap Google Assistant, select General, and toggle it of
